textByHash.00c473f66e79a01c593189599c4885e73d5060ce: Only from your perspective. Someone entering the gate should call you Rightie, right Leftie?
textByHash.e1d0ff778e4e915176fa54be901b03d7c7450808: Yes, head right on in, sir.
textByHash.df97eeae38c8d2d9952e420f574075531935312d: Yes, head right on in, madam.
